core.app.name: PymeSec
core.dashboard.screen.title: Workspace Dashboard
core.dashboard.screen.subtitle: A quick audit-oriented view of the current organization context and work queues.
core.shell.title: Compliance Workspace
core.shell.subtitle: Manage compliance work across the organization.
core.shell.workspace_copy: Manage the selected area for the active organization and scope.
core.shell.no_selection: No visible menu with a route is currently selected.
core.shell.theme_copy: Themes live at the shell layer and should remain token-driven and core-governed, not plugin-defined CSS free-for-all.
core.shell.theme_rule_core: The core owns the shell frame and the visual tokens.
core.shell.theme_rule_plugins: Plugins contribute menus and screens, not arbitrary shell styling.
core.shell.theme_rule_tokens: Theme switching is safe because the runtime only swaps approved design tokens.
core.shell.debug_copy: Runtime and registry information live here instead of the main workspace.
core.shell.debug_footer: Use this panel to inspect shell state, menu resolution, and screen runtime data without mixing it into the main UI.
core.shell.error.title: Screen unavailable
core.shell.error.unavailable_subtitle: The requested area cannot be opened in the current workspace context.
core.shell.error.unavailable_message: The requested shell menu [:menu] is not available or is not allowed for the current principal, organization, or memberships.
core.shell.error.unimplemented_subtitle: The menu exists, but its shell screen has not been implemented yet.
core.shell.error.unimplemented_message: The requested shell menu [:menu] is registered but does not yet have a screen implementation.
core.platform.screen.title: Platform Overview
core.platform.screen.subtitle: Core administration, system posture, and recent platform activity in one place.
core.plugins.screen.title: Plugin Runtime
core.plugins.screen.subtitle: Enabled modules, boot status, and plugin health across the workspace.
core.permissions.screen.title: Permission Catalog
core.permissions.screen.subtitle: Registered permission keys, origins, and scope coverage exposed by the platform.
core.roles.screen.title: Roles & Grants
core.roles.screen.subtitle: Persistent authorization roles and assignments, managed inside the core shell.
core.tenancy.screen.title: Tenant Structure
core.tenancy.screen.subtitle: Organizations, scopes, memberships, and principal placement across the workspace.
core.audit.screen.title: Audit Trail
core.audit.screen.subtitle: Recent security and governance events recorded by the platform audit trail.
core.functional-actors.screen.title: Functional Directory
core.functional-actors.screen.subtitle: Functional actors, linked principals, and current ownership assignments.
